summary: SLA113 Universal AI Game Studio testing complete. Backend: 19/19 tests pass (updated for 16 game types including AAA). Frontend: All partition buttons, tabs, AI terminal, and navigation working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes present on key components
16 game types now supported including AAA types (open_world, tactical_fps, fighting_game, fantasy_rpg, survival_horror)
All 4 partitions (FACTORY, EMPIRE 1, FOUNDRY, VAULT) render correctly with proper color themes
AI Terminal expand/collapse and command execution working
BACK TO CORE navigation working correctly
Vision/Logic/Compose AI generation endpoints make real LLM calls (tested with 30+ second timeouts)
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed projects during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: SLA113 page fully functional. All 4 partitions work: FACTORY (cyan - Frontline, White Label Mint), EMPIRE 1 (indigo - Mint Ledger, Revenue Pipelines), FOUNDRY (gold - OS Builder, Vision Smith, Audio Forge), VAULT (deep red - System Core, Night Queue). AI generation endpoints use real LLM calls. Backend has 16 game types including AAA types.
